en: The sons of Issachar: Tola, Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
zh: 以薩迦的兒子是陀拉、普瓦、雅述和伸崙，共四人。

en: The sons of Tola: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers' houses, namely of Tola, mighty warriors of their generations, their number in the days of David being 22,600.
zh: 陀拉的兒子是烏西、利法雅、耶勒、雅買、易伯散和示母利，都是陀拉家族的族長，是他們那世代英勇的戰士；到了大衛的日子，他們的人數共有二萬二千六百名。

en: The son of Uzzi: Izrahiah. And the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah, all five of them were chief men.
zh: 烏西的兒子是伊斯拉希，伊斯拉希的兒子是米迦勒、俄巴底亞，約珥和伊示雅，共五人，都是各家族的首領。

en: And along with them, by their generations, according to their fathers' houses, were units of the army for war, 36,000, for they had many wives and sons.
zh: 此外，與他們在一起的，按著譜系和家族，還有能作戰的軍隊三萬六千人，因為他們的妻子和兒子很多。

en: Their kinsmen belonging to all the clans of Issachar were in all 87,000 mighty warriors, enrolled by genealogy.
zh: 他們的兄弟在以薩迦各族中，都是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有八萬七千人。

en: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, and Jediael, three.
zh: 便雅憫的兒子是比拉、比結和耶疊，共三人。

en: The sons of Bela: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, five, heads of fathers' houses, mighty warriors. And their enrollment by genealogies was 22,034.
zh: 比拉的兒子是以斯本、烏西、烏薛、耶利摩和以利，共五人，都是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有二萬二千零三十四人。

en: The sons of Becher: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.
zh: 比結的兒子是細米拉、約阿施、以利以謝、以利約乃、暗利、耶利摩、亞比雅、亞拿突和亞拉篾，這都是比結的兒子；

en: And their enrollment by genealogies, according to their generations, as heads of their fathers' houses, mighty warriors, was 22,200.
zh: 他們都是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有二萬零二百人。

en: The son of Jediael: Bilhan. And the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahish-ahar.
zh: 耶疊的兒子是比勒罕；比勒罕的兒子是耶烏斯、便雅憫、以忽、基拿拿、細坦、他施和亞希沙哈；

en: All these were the sons of Jediael according to the heads of their fathers' houses, mighty warriors, 17,200, able to go to war.
zh: 這都是耶疊的兒子，是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，能上陣作戰的，共有一萬七千二百人。

en: And Shuppim and Huppim were the sons of Ir, Hushim the son of Aher.
zh: 還有以珥的兒子書品和戶品，以及亞黑的兒子戶伸。

en: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer and Shallum, the descendants of Bilhah.
zh: 拿弗他利的兒子是雅薛、沽尼、耶色、沙龍；都是辟拉的子孫。

en: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his Aramean concubine bore; she bore Machir the father of Gilead.
zh: 瑪拿西的兒子是亞斯列，是他亞蘭籍的妾所生的；她又生了基列的父親瑪吉。

en: And Machir took a wife for Huppim and for Shuppim. The name of his sister was Maacah. And the name of the second was Zelophehad, and Zelophehad had daughters.
zh: 瑪吉娶了妻子，是戶品和書品的妹妹，名叫瑪迦。瑪拿西的次子名叫西羅非哈；西羅非哈只有幾個女兒。

en: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
zh: 瑪吉的妻子瑪迦生了一個兒子，她就給他起名叫毘利施；毘利施的兄弟名叫示利施；示利施的兒子是烏蘭和利金。

en: The son of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, son of Manasseh.
zh: 烏蘭的兒子是比但。這都是基列的子孫；基列是瑪吉的兒子，瑪吉是瑪拿西的兒子。

en: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ishhod, Abiezer and Mahlah.
zh: 基列的妹妹哈摩利吉生了伊施荷、亞比以謝和瑪拉。

en: The sons of Shemida were Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.
zh: 示米大的兒子是亞現、示劍、利克希和阿尼安。

en: The sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, and Bered his son, Tahath his son, Ele-adah his son, Tahath his son,
zh: 以法蓮的兒子是書提拉，書提拉的兒子是比列，比列的兒子是他哈，他哈的兒子是以拉大，以拉大的兒子是他哈，

en: Zabad his son, Shuthelah his son, and Ezer and Elead, whom the men of Gath who were born in the land killed, because they came down to raid their livestock.
zh: 他哈的兒子是撒拔，撒拔的兒子是書提拉。以謝和以列因為下去奪取迦特人的牲畜，被當地出生的迦特人殺了。

en: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brothers came to comfort him.
zh: 他們的父親以法蓮為他們悲哀多日，他的兄弟都來安慰他。

en: And Ephraim went in to his wife, and she conceived and bore a son. And he called his name Beriah, because disaster had befallen his house.
zh: 以法蓮與妻子同房，他的妻子就懷孕，生了一個兒子；以法蓮就給他起名叫比利亞，因為他的家遭遇禍患。

en: His daughter was Sheerah, who built both Lower and Upper Beth-horon, and Uzzen-sheerah.
zh: 他的女兒是舍伊拉，就是建造上伯．和崙、下伯．和崙和烏羨．舍伊拉的。

en: Rephah was his son, Resheph his son, Telah his son, Tahan his son,
zh: 比利亞的兒子是利法和利悉；利悉的兒子是他拉，他拉的兒子是他罕，

en: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,
zh: 他罕的兒子是拉但，拉但的兒子是亞米忽，亞米忽的兒子是以利沙瑪，

en: Nun his son, Joshua his son.
zh: 以利沙瑪的兒子是嫩，嫩的兒子是約書亞。

en: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel and its towns, and to the east Naaran, and to the west Gezer and its towns, Shechem and its towns, and Ayyah and its towns;
zh: 以法蓮人的地業和居住的地方，是伯特利和屬於伯特利的村莊，東邊有拿蘭，西邊有基色和屬於基色的村莊；示劍和屬於示劍的村莊，直到迦薩和屬於迦薩的村莊。

en: also in possession of the Manassites, Beth-shean and its towns, Taanach and its towns, Megiddo and its towns, Dor and its towns. In these lived the sons of Joseph the son of Israel.
zh: 靠近瑪拿西支派邊界的還有：伯．善和屬於伯．善的村莊；他納和屬於他納的村莊；米吉多和屬於米吉多的村莊；多珥和屬於多珥的村莊。以色列的兒子約瑟的子孫就住在這些地方。

en: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and their sister Serah.
zh: 亞設的兒子是音拿、亦施瓦、亦施韋和比利亞，還有他們的妹妹西拉。

en: The sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who fathered Birzaith.
zh: 比利亞的兒子是希別和瑪結，瑪結是比撒威的父親。

en: Heber fathered Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham, and their sister Shua.
zh: 希別生雅弗勒、朔默、何坦和他們的妹妹書雅。

en: The sons of Japhlet: Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the sons of Japhlet.
zh: 雅弗勒的兒子是巴薩、賓哈和亞施法；這些人是雅弗勒的兒子。

en: The sons of Shemer his brother: Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
zh: 朔默的兒子是亞希、羅迦、耶戶巴和亞蘭。

en: The sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.
zh: 朔默的兄弟希連的兒子是瑣法、音那、示利斯和亞抹。

en: The sons of Zophah: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah.
zh: 瑣法的兒子是書亞、哈尼弗、書阿勒、比利、音拉、

en: Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.
zh: 比悉、河得、珊瑪、施沙、益蘭和比拉。

en: The sons of Jether: Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.
zh: 益帖的兒子是耶孚尼、毘斯巴和亞拉。

en: The sons of Ulla: Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.
zh: 烏拉的兒子是亞拉、漢尼業和利寫。

en: All of these were men of Asher, heads of fathers' houses, approved, mighty warriors, chiefs of the princes. Their number enrolled by genealogies, for service in war, was 26,000 men.
zh: 這都是亞設的子孫，是他們各家族的首領，是傑出英勇的戰士，是領袖中的首領；按著家譜登記的數目，能上陣作戰的共有二萬六千人。
